data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for real-time status updates indicating 'Claimed by someone else'. However, the evidence does not confirm that such updates were provided to users who attempted to book concurrently. The linked use case describes the expected behavior but lacks concrete evidence of the system's implementation of this feature, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that real-time status updates were provided to users who attempted to book concurrently.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
